exam.title: Examination
exam.notDue: This test is not due yet
exam.notDueDesc: You can only take the test when the scheduled date arrives.

switchEye.title: Get ready to switch to left eye test
switchEye.desc: You've completed the right eye test. Please switch the cover to the right eye to proceed with the left eye test.

exam.intro: This test evaluates and tracks the progress of
exam.stereopsisGlassesNote: For the stereopsis test, keep both eyes open and wear red-cyan (anaglyph) glasses over your current glasses if needed.
exam.stereopsisDirectionNote: Ask whether the image appears in front, behind, or not visible, then select the matching answer.
exam.alwaysRightFirst: We always test the right eye first
exam.correspondingTo: corresponding to the missing direction of letters
exam.ifCannotGuess: if you cannot guess, skip and confirm.
exam.noHintsAny: No hints in any form (e.g., 'What letter did mom just say?', 'Which one is round?', ...)
exam.observer: the supporter should observe to ensure accuracy.
exam.ifCompromised: If the eyesight line has been exposed due to dishonesty (e.g., opening the covered eye, squinting, leaning forward...) or you don't trust the accuracy,
exam.shuffleIfNeeded: Only shuffle characters and recheck if the result seems unreliable.
exam.doNotCherryPick: Don't cherry-pick characters you think are good
exam.andRetry: and try many times to get a high result.
exam.because: because we've calculated and analyzed; attempts to interfere will
exam.affectResult: affect the analysis and reduce treatment effectiveness
exam.noExtraLight: No need to increase room brightness
exam.moreLightLessAccurate: additional brightness may reduce result accuracy
exam.keepPracticing: Keep practicing regularly to further improve eyesight!

schedule.title: Vision test schedule
schedule.subtitleSuffix: below is your eyesight test schedule.

exam.setupInstructions: Please enter the required information to start the test:
exam.screenFitWarning: This screen may be too narrow to show all 5 characters in one row. The test will split into batches (e.g. 3+2). Use a larger screen or full-screen browser for best accuracy.
exam.stereopsisInstructions: Look at the images below and indicate whether you see the shape protruding forward or recessed backward.

sessionResults.noteAttemptVsSession: The table below shows attempt-level results; overall session status is shown in the summary above.
